## Contribution checklist

- [ ] Files are added under `data/{first-2-chars-of-videoId}/{videoId}.{src}-{tgt}.json`
- [ ] Each file matches `schema/video-translation.schema.json`
- [ ] `node scripts/validate.mjs` passes locally (CI will re-check)
- [ ] Only translation data is changed (no code / no `main`-branch files)
